name: wsfold
description: Task-shaped multi-repo workspace manager for agents.

interface.shortDescription: Task-shaped multi-repo workspace manager for agents.
interface.longDescription: WSFold helps humans and agents compose exactly the repositories needed for a task, summon trusted or external repositories, create managed worktrees, and clean up with dismiss.
defaultPrompt: Install, configure, and initialize WSFold in this workspace.
Summon the trusted repository needed for this task and inspect it locally.
Attach an external repository for a read-only security review.
